value.description: The SDK tracks file changes made by the Write, Edit, and NotebookEdit tools during an agent session, saving a backup before each modification. You enable it via `enable_file_checkpointing=True`, capture checkpoint UUIDs from the response stream, then call `rewindFiles()`/`rewind_files()` to restore files on disk to any prior state — without rolling back the conversation history. Note: changes made via Bash commands are not tracked.
value.label: File Checkpointing
